title: Processing Flow
text: Processing Flow The following process explains how the Layout Mode Property controls layout generation from definition to runtime. Main DSP Processing When processing a DSP, the Layout Mode determines how the final HTML is constructed: Generated: Layout template provides complete HTML with component binding points Fragment: DSP Layout fragment is wrapped within layout template structure Full Document: DSP Layout is sent to the browser without modification Contained DSP Processing For contained DSPs (DSPs called from within other DSPs), the processing differs: Generated: Component widgets render within provided structure Fragment: DSP Layout fragment becomes part of the response content Full Document: The <head> section is removed and only body content is used Was this topic helpful?
